Video.summary: In this charity showdown, Pro pickleball players and celebs will represent their alma maters and battle it out for the Picklebowl 2023 trophy. Hosted by Heisman Trophy winner and former NFL player turned pickleball enthusiast, Danny Wuerffel.
Video.title: Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament

Image.alt: Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament
Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament
Picklebowl 2023 - Full Tournament

Video.summary: Live from Virginia Beach at the NCPA Virginia Regional 2025, the University of Virginia (UVA) faces off against High Point University in a crucial pool play match. With a bid to the National Championship in St. Louis on the line, these teams battle through a best-of-seven format.The episode kicks off with Women's Singles featuring Alexandra McDonald (UVA) and Sushi Bandaru (High Point), followed by an intense Men's Singles showdown between Eric Lee (UVA) and High Point's wild card, Freddy Ortmann. The action heats up in Men's Doubles with Cooper Duncan joining Ortmann, and Aiden Eggleston partnering with Lee. Watch for strategic mixed doubles play and see if High Point can force a sudden death dreambreaker.
Video.title: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Image.alt: NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point
NCPA Virginia Regional 2025 - Collegiate Team Match - UVA vs. High Point

Video.summary: The action from Day 6 of the World Pickleball League continues with a crucial matchup between the Delhi Dilwale and the Hyderabad Superstars.
Video.title: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2

Image.alt: WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2
WPBL 2025 - Delhi vs. Hyderabad - Day 6 Tie 2

Video.summary: The grand finale of the World Pickleball League Season 2 descends upon Mumbai’s Jio World Garden for an unforgettable clash of titans between the Chennai Super Champs and Delhi Dilwale. Witness the technical mastery of Rika Fujiwara as she faces off against Alejandra Lopez in a high-stakes women’s singles match that sets the tone for the entire championship. The intensity reaches a fever pitch during a mixed doubles "masterclass" featuring Max Mansoor and Trang Huynh, which commentators hailed as the potential "rally of the season". With the "Band of Honor" and the ultimate league trophy on the line, every strategic "Pickle Play" and nerve-wracking volley contributes to an atmosphere so electric the crowd and commentators alike are left "going berserk".
Video.title: WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1

Image.alt: WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1
WPBL 2026 Grand Final - Chennai vs Delhi - Day 13 Tie 1

Video.summary: Get ready for thrilling Pro Men's Doubles pickleball action from the Minto US Open Pickleball Championships at East Naples Community Park, the National Pickleball Center! This semi-final match features the dynamic duo of Richard Livornese Jr. and Ryler Deheart against the formidable team of Ben Newell and Brandon Lane. Witness incredible rallies, aggressive plays, and strategic dinks as these top players battle it out for a spot in Championship Saturday. Don't miss this high-energy competition from the epicenter of pickleball!
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell
US Open 2025 - Pro Men's Doubles - Livornese/Deheart vs. Lane/Newell

Video.summary: Experience the excitement of the Mixed Split Pro Age pickleball match on Championship Court. This video features a unique pairing of new partners Schull and Endara, who are familiar with the heat and come from a grinding three-game win in their last match. They face off against the formidable Lee Whitwell and Kafka. With Lee Whitwell's impressive hands and athleticism, and Kafka's hard-hitting forehand and topspin drives, this is a matchup you won't want to miss. Get ready for incredible rallies and a display of top-tier pickleball as these pros battle it out.
Video.title: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Image.alt: US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara
US Open 2025 - Mixed Split Pro Age - Whitewell/Kawka vs. Schull/Endara

Video.summary: Dayne Gingrich and Mircea Morariu take on Christian Bohnert and Todd Robertson in this Men's Senior Pro Semifinal Match.
Video.title: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Image.alt: US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal
US Open Pickleball Championships 2024 - Men's Senior Pro Doubles - Semifinal

Video.summary: In this thrilling gold medal match from the 2024 US Open Pickleball Championships, Dylan Frazier and Altaf Merchant take on defending champions Andrei Daescu and Dave Weinbach in the Men’s Split Pro Doubles division. The action heats up fast as Frazier and Merchant dominate early, only to be met with a fierce comeback from Daescu and Weinbach in game two. Momentum swings, net-cord drama, and tactical shifts lead to an electrifying third game where every point counts.From Frazier’s lightning-fast hands to Daescu’s towering net play, this match showcases elite shot-making, sharp strategy, and high emotion on Championship Court. With the crowd on edge and the gold medal on the line, it’s a true masterclass in professional pickleball.
Video.title: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Image.alt: US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach
US Open 2024 – Men’s Split Pro Doubles Gold Medal Match – Frazier & Merchant vs Daescu & Weinbach

Video.summary: This thrilling Group C matchup in the Men’s Doubles Open division features Edward Turney & Ben Cawston against Auto Stephens & Nick Hobbis. Filmed at the Bolton Arena during the 2023 English Nationals, the match showcases intense volleys, smart shot selection, and some of the best defensive play of the tournament. Don’t miss this showdown from the heart of England’s pickleball scene.
Video.title: English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis

Image.alt: English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis
English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis
English Nationals 2023 - Group C Match 2 - Turney/Cawston vs. Stephens/Hobbis

Video.summary: In this US Open semifinal showdown, top seeds Kyle Yates and Andrei Daescu face off against the dynamic duo of Austin Gridley and Mario Barrientos. With strategic finesse and explosive play, both teams battle for a spot in the final. A must-watch clash of styles and strengths on Championship Court.
Video.title: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Image.alt: US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

US Open 2023 – Men’s Pro Doubles Semifinal – Yates & Daescu vs Gridley & Barrientos

Video.summary: Live from the European Pickleball Championships 2025 in Rome, Italy, witness back-to-back high-stakes matchups. First, in Women's Doubles Open, Team England’s Thaddea Lock and Katie Morris face off against Team France’s Elodie Busson and Adeline Nguyen. In a "nip and tuck" group decider, both teams trade aggressive volleys and "shake and bake" attacks before England finds a tactical edge to break the deadlock.
Video.title: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover

Image.alt: Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
Lock/Morris vs. Busson/Nguyen + Laville vs. Arnover
